parsed.production_notes: Left side is an AI avatar with uncanny smoothness, unnaturally large eyes, and a static pose. Right side is a human-recorded video with natural movement.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, red hair pulled back, large brown eyes.
Young female, fair complexion, blonde hair pulled back, blue eyes.

panels.panel_visual_description: Close-up of Character A. She has fair skin, red hair pulled back, and large brown eyes. She wears a grey turtleneck and rests her chin on her right hand. The background is a plain, warm wall. Lighting is soft and even.

Close-up of Character B. She has fair skin, blonde hair pulled back, and blue eyes. She wears a cream ribbed sweater and rests her chin on her left hand. The background is a softly lit room with a curtain. Lighting is warm.

scenes.visual_description: Vertical split-screen of two women conversing. Left side shows Character A against a plain background. Right side shows Character B in a softly lit room. Both rest their chins on their hands, mirroring each other. Captions and a logo appear over the video.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Sorry, my English is not good.
Character A says: You should practice everyday.
Character B says: But I don't have anyone to practice with.
Character A says: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character B says: I can speak with you?
Character A says: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation.
Character B says: But I make a lot of mistakes.
Character A says: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Character B says: Sounds good.
Character A says: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
